Lock Internet access ability, forbidding the user to access external networks.
Log off users for driver errors.
Disable 802.1X PAP authentication and refuse PAP authentication requests.
Prohibit client exit. When this function is enabled, the client "Exit" menu will be grayed out.
Please enter the server domain name.
Please enter the server port number in the range of 1 to 65535.
SMS Verification Code and RSA dynamic password verification cannot be set as Selected by default at the same time.
Cannot enable this function because SMS verification has been enabled.
Cannot enable this function because RSA dynamic password verification has been enabled.
Enable WAN Access Control Escape(After this feature is enabled, it may be possible to restrict intranet outreach).
port error, please input a valid value between 0 and 65535
Please enter the iMC server IP address.
Please enter the DNS server IP address.
The retry interval cannot be smaller than 0 seconds.
Please select the default identity verification mode.
Please select at least one identity verification mode.
Please select the default identity authentication mode.
Please select at least one identity authentication mode.
The first SSL VPN gateway address in the list will be automatically set as the default gateway.
You cannot select certificate authentication as the default verification mode when RADIUS is used as the default authentication type.
The specified IP address or domain name of the SSL VPN gateway already exists.
The display name cannot be empty.
The server address or port cannot be empty.
Please enter an integer in the range of 1 to 65535.
Please enter the IP address or domain name of the SSL VPN gateway.
Please enter a valid server domain name.
Use the default authentication method on the gateway
Interval to obtain SMS verification code (seconds)
Enter an integer in the range of 5 to 180.
Select the Upload version info option only when the iMC server acts as the authentication server.
Identity authenticator is empty or contains invalid characters.Please input again.
The length of the LNS server cannot exceed 255 bytes.
The length of the Second LNS server cannot exceed 255 bytes.
The length of the IPsec server cannot exceed 255 bytes.
You have selected the Use NAT traversal option. Please enter the local security gateway name and remote security gateway name in the IKE Settings area.
ISAKMP-SA lifetime is error, please input a valid value between 60 and 604800.
Local security gateway name is empty or contains invalid characters.Please input again.
Remote security gateway name is empty or contains invalid characters.Please input again.
Send KeepAlive packets time interval is error, please input a valid value between 20 and 28800.
Receive KeepAlive packets timeout time is error, please input a valid value between 20 and 28800.
IKE port error，please input a valid value between 0 and 65535
SA lifetime is error, please input a valid value between 30 and 604800.
Tunnel name is empty or contains invalid characters.Please input again.
Interval for sending Hello packets is error, please input a valid value between 60 and 1000.
Tunnel authentication password is empty or contains invalid characters.Please input again.
The inputted value contains illegal characters.
L2TP port error, please input a valid value between 0 and 65535
Are you sure to delete the route?
network address and mask cannot be empty.
The specified mask parameter is invalid, (network address & Mask) != network address.
There is already a same network address.
Each network address must be the same as the result of a bitwise AND operation between the network address and the associated mask.
The domain description cannot be empty.
A Domain info with the same name aready exists in the list.
A Domain info with the same description aready exists in the list.
Please select a Domain info to delete from the list.

Customization succeeded with an extra customized client setup program created.
Customization succeeded with an extra customized client upgrade package.
Custom is complete. A new lightweight upgrade package is generated.
Customization succeeded with both a client setup program and a client upgrade package created.
Customization is complete. New client installation package and lightweight upgrade package are generated.
Customization is complete. New client upgrade package and lightweight upgrade package are generated.
Customization is complete. New client installation package, client upgrade package, and lightweight upgrade package are generated.
Customization succeeded without extra customized client setup program or client upgrade package.
Click Find Target to view the new customized client setup program.
Click Find Target to view the new customized client upgrade package.
Click the following button to view the generated lightweight upgrade package.

If the redirection fails, please get the customized client upgrade package from the following path:
If the redirection fails, please get the generated lightweight upgrade package from the following path:
Click Find Target to view the new customized TRM client setup program.
If the redirection fails, please get the customized TRM client setup program from the following path:
Customization succeeded with an extra customized TRM client setup program created.
Customization is complete. New client installation package and TRM client installation package created.
Customization is complete. New client upgrade package and TRM client installation package created.
Customization is complete. New lightweight client upgrade package and TRM client installation package created.
Customization is complete. New client installation package, client upgrade package, and TRM client installation package created.
Customization is complete. New client upgrade package, lightweight upgrade package and TRM client installation package created.
Customization is complete. New client upgrade package, lightweight upgrade package and TRM client installation package created.
It is recommended to specify the supplementary information (such as "HR V1.0") to help you distinguish between configuration files.
Customized client setup is used to install iNode client on PCs which have no iNode client installed or upgrade previous clients to current version.
Customized client upgrade package, which must be deployed on the server which is corresponding to the client, is used to upgrade previous clients to current version automatically.
The lightweight client upgrade package is stored on the UAM server with which the client communicates to upgrade the client of a specific version to the current version.
Could not find the target file.
Generate customized TRM client setup program

Please select the default filtering action for all network adapters' IPv6 packets when offline:
Lock Internet access ability(Default deny,IPV6 packet:Default deny)
Lock Internet access ability(Default permit,IPV6 packet:Default deny)
Lock Internet access ability(Default deny,IPV6 packet:Default permit)
Lock Internet access ability(Default permit,IPV6 packet:Default permit)
Each customization is identified by its creation time.
Are you sure to delete all customizations?
Please select the default configuration for the customization
iNode client supports various network access methods.
Wireless access,support wireless access network protocols
L2TP IPsec VPN,support L2TP IPsec VPN protocols
iNode client supports the following function components.
EAD,Endpoint admission defense. Only the policy-compliant terminal are granted full access.
VDI,Combined use of cloud desktop and zerotrust
Click Advanced to custom advanced details.
Click Finish to finish current customization.

Lock Internet access ability, forbidding the user to access external networks.
Enable password protection. Enter the correct password before you can remove the client.
Enable WAN Access Control Escape(After this feature is enabled, it may be possible to restrict intranet outreach).
Tip: Don't custom EAD svr IP in escape scenario.
Installation: Install the client on a PC that has not installed one or to upgrade an earlier version to the current version; upgrade: used to upgrade an earlier version to the current version.
